svg.title: Concord — Scripture, served locally.
svg.desc: Banner for Concord. The wordmark "Concord" set in a warm indigo serif on a warm cream background, with a small stylized green leaf ornament centered above and the italic tagline "Scripture, served locally." centered below.

text.font-family: 'EB Garamond', 'Cormorant Garamond', Garamond, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif
